infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need your location to provide trail navigation and safety monitoring.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Background location is used for safety check-ins, fall detection, and emergency alerts during hikes.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Motion sensors are used for automatic fall detection during hikes.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera is used to capture photos when reporting trail hazards.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Hiking Trail Navigator to use your location for navigation and safety monitoring.

plugins.motionPermission: Allow Hiking Trail Navigator to access motion sensors for fall detection.
